message:
feat(demo_showcase): Complete OSC 8 hyperlink integration in overlays

- Add links parameter to draw_help_overlay and apply hyperlinks to Links section
- Add links parameter to draw_palette_overlay (reserved for future use)
- Add links parameter to draw_logs_panel (reserved for future use)
- Remove unused GraphemePool import
- Mark unicode_url field as reserved with #[allow(dead_code)]
- Clean up clippy suggestions for doc comments

Hyperlinks in the help overlay (F1) are now clickable in terminals
supporting OSC 8 (e.g., iTerm2, WezTerm, Ghostty).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
